- [ ] General feedback
- [ ] UX/UI improvement
- [ ] Performance concern
- [ ] Documentation issue
- [ ] Onboarding experience

## 📦 Product
Which Mylesoft product is this feedback about?

## 💬 Your Feedback
Share your thoughts, ideas, or suggestions in detail.

## 🌍 Your Context
- Role: [e.g. Teacher, School Admin, Parent, Developer]
- Organisation: [e.g. School name, optional]
- Country: [e.g. Kenya, Uganda, Tanzania]

## ⭐ Overall Experience
How would you rate your experience with this product?
- [ ] ⭐ Poor
- [ ] ⭐⭐ Fair
- [ ] ⭐⭐⭐ Good
- [ ] ⭐⭐⭐⭐ Very Good
- [ ] ⭐⭐⭐⭐⭐ Excellent
